title: Shikhi Devta Div No. 1 — Sacred 45 Devta Vastu Energizer
shortDescription: Sacred Shikhi Devta Div No. 1 — Divine fire element activator for the southeast Vastu zone, purifying energies and igniting prosperity.
description: The Shikhi Devta Div No. 1 embodies the divine fire element, representing illumination, purification, and the sacred flame of cosmic consciousness. In Vastu Shastra, Shikhi governs the southeast zone of your space, channeling transformative fire energy to ignite prosperity and remove negativity. Crafted with sacred geometric precision and infused with Vedic mantras during production, this premium Div is an essential cornerstone of any complete 45 Devta Vastu setup. Placing the Shikhi Devta Div activates the Agni corner of your home or workspace, bringing warmth, motivation, and the divine spark of success into your daily life.
benefits: Ignites the fire element in your Vastu grid

title: Parjanya Devta Div No. 2 — Sacred 45 Devta Vastu Energizer
shortDescription: Sacred Parjanya Devta Div No. 2 — Celestial rain energy activator for abundance, timely opportunities, and removal of stagnation.
description: The Parjanya Devta Div No. 2 channels the divine energy of rain, thunder, and celestial moisture. As the lord of clouds and precipitation, Parjanya governs the flow of abundance and timely blessings into your life and home. This sacred Div activates the northern water corridors of your Vastu grid, ensuring a steady inflow of wealth, resources, and cosmic nourishment. Handcrafted with premium materials and consecrated through traditional Vedic processes, the Parjanya Div is revered by Vastu experts for its ability to bring timely opportunities and remove the stagnation of unfulfilled potential. Install this Div to invite the refreshing rains of prosperity and divine grace.
benefits: Activates the rain and abundance energies in your space
Stimulates timely arrival of opportunities and wealth
Removes stagnation and blockages in career and finances

title: Jayant Devta Div No. 3 — Sacred 45 Devta Vastu Energizer
shortDescription: Sacred Jayant Devta Div No. 3 — Divine victory energy activator for success, recognition, and overcoming all obstacles.
description: The Jayant Devta Div No. 3 embodies the triumphant energy of victory, success, and divine conquest. Son of Indra and beloved of the celestial realm, Jayant carries the vibration of overcoming all obstacles and emerging victorious in every endeavor. This powerful Div activates zones of achievement and recognition in your Vastu grid, making it an ideal companion for professionals, entrepreneurs, and anyone seeking to rise above competition. Produced with meticulous Vedic standards and embedded with victory-invoking intentions, the Jayant Div fills your environment with the irresistible momentum of success and divine favor.
benefits: Invokes the energy of victory and triumph in all pursuits
Removes obstacles blocking success and recognition
Activates competitive advantage and leadership aura
Supports legal victories and dispute resolution
Enhances confidence and magnetic personal presence

shortDescription: Sacred Mahendra Devta Div No. 4 — Supreme celestial power activator for divine authority, protection, and northeast energy zone.
description: The Mahendra Devta Div No. 4 embodies supreme celestial power, majesty, and divine authority. As one of the most potent Devtas in the sacred 45-Div system, Mahendra governs the northeast zone of profound energy, channeling the highest frequencies of divine consciousness into your living or working space. This magnificent Div is crafted with the finest materials and treated with sacred herbs and Vedic infusions to amplify its vibrational potency. The Mahendra Div is especially prized by spiritual practitioners, business leaders, and heads of family who seek to establish commanding authority, divine protection, and an atmosphere of reverence in their environments.
benefits: Establishes supreme authority and commanding presence
Activates the northeast divine energy corridor
Provides powerful protection against negative forces

shortDescription: Sacred Surya Devta Div No. 5 — Solar energy activator for the east zone, channeling vitality, confidence, and radiant health.
description: The Surya Devta Div No. 5 channels the life-giving energy of the Sun, the central luminary of our solar system and the source of all vitality, health, and enlightenment. In the 45 Devta Vastu system, Surya holds a position of supreme importance, governing the east zone of rising energy and new beginnings. This radiant Div is crafted to invite the warm, golden frequencies of solar consciousness into your home, stimulating physical health, mental clarity, and the confidence to illuminate your true potential. Ideal for placement in the east-facing areas of homes and offices, the Surya Devta Div is among the most essential of the complete 45-Div sacred set.
benefits: Channels solar vitality and radiant health energy

shortDescription: Sacred Satya Devta Div No. 6 — Divine truth energy activator for integrity, clarity, and protection from deception.

In an age of uncertainty, the Satya Div stands as a spiritual anchor, filling your environment with vibrations of honesty, clarity, and dharmic alignment. Placed within the Vastu grid, this sacred Div activates truth-seeking energies that sharpen discernment, dispel illusion, and protect inhabitants from deception. Beautifully crafted with premium materials and Vedic precision, the Satya Div is treasured by seekers, judges, teachers, and all who hold truth as a supreme value in their lives and work.
benefits: Infuses the space with vibrations of truth and integrity

description: The Bhrisha Devta Div No. 7 represents divine strength, resilience, and the unyielding power of endurance. This sacred Div channels the earth-rooted energy of steadfastness and invincibility into your Vastu grid, making it an invaluable companion for those who face persistent challenges or seek to build unshakeable foundations in their personal and professional lives. Meticulously crafted using traditional Vedic specifications, the Bhrisha Div carries a grounded, powerful vibration that reinforces structural integrity in both physical spaces and personal character, helping inhabitants rise above adversity with grace and undefeated spirit.

shortDescription: Sacred Akash Devta Div No. 8 — Sky element activator for infinite possibilities, creative expansion, and spiritual awareness.
description: The Akash Devta Div No. 8 embodies the infinite sky element, representing boundless possibilities, expansive consciousness, and the vast freedom of the cosmic space. In Vastu Shastra, Akash or Ether is the most subtle of the five elements and governs the upper regions of any enclosed space. The Akash Div opens the crown of your home's energy field, allowing higher frequencies of inspiration, divine guidance, and creative intelligence to flow in freely. This beautifully detailed Div is essential for those who seek to expand their horizons, dissolve mental limitations, and connect with the infinite creative intelligence of the universe.

Activates ether element for heightened spiritual awareness

shortDescription: Sacred Anil Devta Div No. 9 — Wind element activator for communication, mental agility, and fresh dynamic energy flow.
description: The Anil Devta Div No. 9 governs the sacred wind element, the vital breath of life that animates all living beings and carries the divine whisper of cosmic intelligence. As one of the five elemental Devtas, Anil holds mastery over movement, communication, and the invisible forces that carry energy from one place to another. Placing the Anil Div in your Vastu grid activates zones of communication, travel, and mental agility, bringing fresh energy flow that dissolves stagnation and breathes new life into every dimension of your living space. Perfect for offices, study rooms, and spaces where dynamic thought and communication are paramount.
benefits: Activates the wind element for fresh energy circulation
Enhances communication, eloquence, and mental agility

shortDescription: Sacred Pusha Devta Div No. 10 — Divine nourishment activator for abundance, steady provision, and life-giving sustenance.
description: The Pusha Devta Div No. 10 embodies divine nourishment, abundance, and the celestial caretaker who ensures all beings receive their proper sustenance. Associated with the sun's nurturing aspect, Pusha governs the flow of resources, food, and material wellbeing into the household. This exquisitely crafted Div activates zones of provision and plenty in your Vastu grid, making it especially valuable for homes seeking to strengthen financial stability, food security, and the generous flow of divine provision. The Pusha Div is particularly revered in dining areas and kitchens, where its vibration of nourishment enhances the life-giving quality of every meal.
benefits: Activates divine nourishment and abundance frequencies

Enhances the life-giving quality of food and nutrition

shortDescription: Sacred Vitatha Devta Div No. 11 — Sacred transformation activator for major life changes, inner truth, and spiritual evolution.

Vitatha is revered in classical Vastu texts as a guardian of transformative processes, making this Div especially valuable during periods of significant life change, business pivots, or spiritual evolution. shortDescription: Sacred Brihatkshat Devta Div No. 12 — Divine guardian activator for powerful property protection and security of the household.
description: The Brihatkshat Devta Div No. 12 stands as a mighty guardian and protector within the 45 Devta Vastu system. The name itself means 'great protector of the field,' and this Div channels the fierce, watchful energy of divine guardianship into your property. Placed at the designated point in your Vastu grid, the Brihatkshat Div creates an invisible shield of cosmic protection around your home or workspace, warding off negative intrusions, psychic disturbances, and environmental hazards. Vastu practitioners prize this Div for its exceptional protective qualities and recommend it as an essential component of any comprehensive Vastu remedy.
benefits: Establishes a powerful shield of divine protection
Guards against negative intrusions and psychic disturbances

shortDescription: Sacred Yama Devta Div No. 13 — Cosmic justice activator for dharmic order, fairness in legal matters, and karmic balance.
description: The Yama Devta Div No. 13 embodies divine cosmic justice, dharmic order, and the sacred principle of karmic balance. As the lord of dharma and cosmic accountant of all actions, Yama's presence in your Vastu grid ensures that your space operates in perfect alignment with natural law and divine justice. Far from being ominous, the Yama Div brings clarity, fairness, and the restoration of balance to any environment where chaos or injustice has taken root. Crafted with sacred precision and consecrated with dharma-invoking Vedic processes, this Div is especially valued by those who seek fairness in legal matters, business dealings, and interpersonal relationships.
benefits: Restores cosmic justice and dharmic order to the space
Brings clarity and fairness to legal and business matters
Activates the principle of karmic balance and accountability

shortDescription: Sacred Gandharva Devta Div No. 14 — Celestial harmony activator for artistic inspiration, beauty, and harmonious relationships.

The Gandharvas are the celestial musicians of the heavenly realms, and their divine representative in the 45 Devta system fills your space with vibrations of beauty, artistic inspiration, and harmonious relationships. This artistically crafted Div is a favorite among musicians, artists, designers, and all creative professionals who seek to elevate the aesthetic quality and inspirational atmosphere of their workspaces. The Gandharva Div transforms any ordinary room into a sanctuary of beauty and creative flow.
benefits: Fills the space with celestial music and harmony vibrations

title: Bhringraj Devta Div No. 15 — Sacred 45 Devta Vastu Energizer
shortDescription: Sacred Bhringraj Devta Div No. 15 — Divine growth and rejuvenation activator for health, vitality, and nature's renewal energy.
description: The Bhringraj Devta Div No. 15 embodies divine growth, regeneration, and the lush, vital energy of nature's perpetual renewal. Named after the sacred Bhringraj herb renowned in Ayurveda for its restorative properties, this Div channels the healing intelligence of nature into your Vastu grid. The Bhringraj Div activates zones of health, growth, and rejuvenation, making it particularly valuable for families seeking improved wellbeing, for gardens and green spaces, and for businesses engaged in healing, wellness, or natural products. Its vibration of perpetual renewal supports both physical vitality and the regeneration of depleted resources.
benefits: Activates divine growth and regeneration in the space
